    <title>Elevated errors on Sonnet 5 and Haiku 4.5</title>
    <content type="html"><p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>17</var>, <var data-var='time'>07:10</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Identified</strong> - The issue has been identified and a fix is being implemented. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>17</var>, <var data-var='time'>07:03</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Monitoring</strong> - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>17</var>, <var data-var='time'>06:47</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Investigating</strong> - We are currently investigating this issue. </p></content>

  <entry>

    <title>Elevated errors for multiple models</title>
    <content type="html"><p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>16</var>, <var data-var='time'>22:53</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Resolved</strong> - This issue has been resolved. From 11:30am PT / 18:30 UTC through to 3:15pm PT / 22:15 UTC some users experienced elevated errors on requests to Claude Models. Most errors were experienced within the first hour of the impact window. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>16</var>, <var data-var='time'>22:01</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Monitoring</strong> - We have seen success rates recover and are continuing to monitor closely to ensure no further issues. We will provide an additional update shortly. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>16</var>, <var data-var='time'>20:58</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Update</strong> - At this time, we are seeing recovery on requests to most models. We are continuing to see elevated errors on requests to Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5, and are working to resolve these remaining issues. We will provide an additional update as soon as possible. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>16</var>, <var data-var='time'>20:07</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Update</strong> - We are continuing to work to resolve issues resulting in elevated errors on requests to some Anthropic models. We will provide additional updates as soon as possible. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>16</var>, <var data-var='time'>19:14</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Identified</strong> - We have identified the cause of elevated errors on requests to multiple models, and are working to resolve this issue.
